spacing_and_layout.hero_layout: asymmetric split layout, deep navy left side / paper texture right side or overlapping structure
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-none or minimal rounded-sm (2px to 4px max, strict institutional feel)
spacing_and_layout.shadows: shadow-sm for subtle elevation, no soft colorful dropshadows; stick to crisp 1px borders

motion.hover_state: subtle opacity shifts, slow line drawing, elegant background darkening
motion.entrance: fade-in with slight vertical shift (10px max), no bouncing

header.elements: Bilingual logo, primary navigation, language toggle (AR/EN), Login CTA
header.rules: Must not be bulky. Logo properly sized. No hamburger on desktop.

hero.style: Editorial composition, high tension between massive Arabic headline and refined English serif.
hero.layout: Asymmetric bento or split grid. Example: Left side solid Deep Navy containing the text, Right side an image slot with a very subtle geometric texture or library interior.
hero.elements: Eyebrow tag, strong Arabic headline, English counterpart, meta-data (volume/issue style), two CTAs (Explore, Contact)
hero.rules: Do not use standard centered layout. Include a subtle vertical rule.

footer.elements: Logo, brand blurb, sitemap, contact, social, legal copyright
footer.rules: Py-24 spacing. Distinct sections. Restrained links.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white border border-transparent hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors rounded-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-primary border border-border_gray hover:border-primary transition-colors rounded-sm

images.description: Close up of contemporary geometric pattern/window
Ornate geometric screen on a building facade.
A dimly lit library with bookshelves and a large window.

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow Arabic-first/RTL layout using Tailwind 'rtl:' and 'ltr:' directives if applicable, or manage direction based on html dir attribute.
Ensure 'IBM Plex Sans Arabic' is imported and applied properly via Tailwind config.
Do NOT use typical SaaS centered hero layout. Create an asymmetric editorial layout.
Maintain high contrast. Use the provided deep navy and ivory colors.
Apply rigorous 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive and structural components.
Ensure the hero layout conveys a serious institutional vibe without generic stock photos of scales or gavels.
Footer should be deeply styled with Deep Navy (#121A2A), providing a solid grounding for the page.
Do not invent new colors, adhere strictly to the color_palette.
Make use of the geometric or library images for the hero section.
